prompt: Review the Go code in counter.go and report any security, architecture, or code-quality issues you find. Provide a written report with severity ratings (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), evidence (file + line), and recommended fixes.
assertions: Detects command injection in pingHandler (shell concatenation) as HIGH
Detects data race on global counter variable
Detects XSS in profileHandler (unescaped name) as HIGH
